_doc: Single source of truth for per-set booster MSRP. Edit freely — keys are lowercase Scryfall set codes, values are USD prices for any of 'play', 'draft', 'collector'. Sets not listed here fall back to the default MSRP from data/booster-contents/default.json (play: 5.99, draft: 3.99, collector: 25.99). This file beats data/sets/<code>.json cost blocks and data/booster-contents/*.json costUsd blocks — use it for quick price tweaks without touching the rest of the booster config.
